name: ai-project-kickoff
description: Create durable project kickoff context packages before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Generate project context docs before implementation.
interface.longDescription: AI Project Kickoff turns a PRD, product idea, or existing repo into a durable context package with AGENTS.md, product overview, architecture, design, progress, implementation rules, wireframes, and optional governance records.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create a kickoff context package for this project.
